description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The front facade includes a wooden deck and patio area, partially shaded by an overhanging balcony. The property is enclosed by a low hedge and includes landscaped elements such as trees, shrubs, and a small garden area. The backyard is equipped with outdoor furniture, a swing set, and additional seating, making it suitable for family activities. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray materials, with wood accents adding warmth to the overall design.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roof bungalow with large glass windows, wood accents, and landscaped outdoor areas enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden deck, patio, and large glass windows with a tree and hedge in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, upper balcony, and the hedge boundary with trees and garden elements visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swing set, outdoor furniture, and two prominent trees within the enclosed garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony, secondary entrance, and more of the landscaped perimeter with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
